# orgIsManagerOf

Execute the orgIsManagerOf query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.orgIsManagerOf({ pEntityId: '<value>', pManagerId: '<value>', pUserId: '<value>', pMaxDepth: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples
